role_title: Sr. Associate, Retail Go-To-Market Operations - Growth & Innovation

location.office_time_required: no fixed requirement; regular in-person events mentioned under Flex First policy

level_signals: 3+ years of experience in operations, program coordination, business strategy, or a related field
Title is 'Sr. Associate' — typically mid-to-senior individual contributor
Compensation range tops at $126,500 base in highest-cost markets, consistent with senior associate / mid-level IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of experience in operations, program coordination, business strategy, or a related field in a fast-paced environment where priorities shift frequently.
Strong analytical skills with a demonstrated ability to design experiments, analyze results, and make data-driven decisions.
Excellent project management skills, with the ability to lead complex, cross-functional initiatives from concept to completion.
Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence and align partners across various departments.
A strategic and innovative mindset with a passion for identifying new opportunities and solving complex problems.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building and maintaining operational workflows, trackers, and documentation that keep cross-functional teams organized and accountable. You default to creating structure, not waiting for it.
Experience in retail operations or in-store programs.

Comfort operating in ambiguity and through competing priorities. You build a process where none exists, stay steady when multiple workstreams need attention at once, and know how to move forward without waiting for perfect information.
Experience with performance metrics and KPIs, such as increasing order volume and maintaining high store associate satisfaction

scope.surface: Retail Go-To-Market Operations — Growth & Innovation pillar; in-store technology and operational programs across Instacart's launched retail partner store portfolio
scope.business_model: B2B2C — Instacart sells in-store technology and grocery delivery infrastructure to retail partners, who serve consumers
core_responsibilities: Support the design and execution of pilot programs aimed at improving quality, increasing order volume, reducing costs, and enhancing in-store workflows for our retail partners.
Collaborate with Product, Retail, and Data Science teams to test, validate, and help scale successful operational innovations across our network of launched stores.
Contribute to the development of strategic frameworks used to identify and evaluate new growth opportunities and address operational process gaps.
Track the impact of initiatives against established KPIs, help synthesize results, and support reporting to leadership and cross-functional stakeholders.
Champion a culture of continuous improvement and data-driven experimentation within the team and broader organization.
Travel to support on-the-ground observations and experimentation, working directly in stores to understand operations and provide hands-on support in rolling out initiatives.

compensation.equity_form: new hire equity grant plus annual refresh grants

green_flags: Compensation ranges explicitly disclosed for all US geographies
Clear ownership area with real product and operational scope
High visibility role described: 'sitting at the intersection of operations, experimentation, and strategy'
Explicit growth path mentioned: 'opportunity to grow into program ownership'
red_flags: Role requires travel to stores for on-the-ground observations — remote candidates should be aware of this travel expectation
Compensation ceiling ($126,500 in CA/NY/CT/NJ) is relatively modest for a senior IC role at a public tech company in high-cost markets
Some preferred qualifications (ambiguity comfort, structure-building) are described in behavioral/cultural terms that are difficult to assess objectively

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Sr. Associate', years requirement, and compensation range)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and retail partner context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities and preferred qualifications; not explicitly listed as a standalone section)
compensation.base_range_usd min/max (stated as multiple geo-bands; $100,000–$126,500 represents the full US floor-to-ceiling spread)
ambiguities: The JD is tagged #LI-Remote and references Flex First remote policy, but also requires travel to stores for on-the-ground operations support. Treated as remote-us with travel obligation.
No explicit visa sponsorship or work authorization language; left as 'unclear'.
Compensation is listed in four geographic tiers; base_range_usd is populated with the absolute min ($100,000) and absolute max ($126,500) across all US tiers for queryability.
